REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, INTERVENOR'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE, TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS, AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS GRANTED. LIS PENDENS RECORDED AGAINST 1310 PALOU AVENUE PROPERTY IS EXPUNGED. THE COMPLAINT, AS CURRENTLY ALLEGED, DOES NOT ASSERT A REAL PROPERTY CLAIM. THE PRAYER FOR RELIEF IS NOT TETHERED TO ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION ASSERTED IN THE COMPLAINT AGAINST ANYONE PURPORTEDLY WITH AN ADVERSE INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY SUPPORTING A REQUEST FOR A JUDGMENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS THE OWNER IN FEE SIMPLE OF THE PROPERTY. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,710. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

INTERVENOR'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE, TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS, AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

INTERVENOR'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE, TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS, AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES
is GRANTED. Lis Pendens recorded against 1310 Palou Avenue property is expunged. The Complaint, as currently alleged, does not assert a real property claim. The prayer for relief is not tethered to any of the causes of action asserted in the complaint against anyone purportedly with an adverse interest in the property supporting a request for a judgment that Plaintiff is the owner in fee simple of the property. Attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $2,710.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
